name: matplotlib
tagline: Reference guide for using matplotlib (OO vs pyplot API, subplots, styling, exports) — plain documentation, no risky behavior.
verdict: Clean, low-risk skill. It only teaches matplotlib usage patterns (plotting, styling, saving figures) via `uv add`/`uv run` and standard Python code; no network calls, no credential handling, no shell piping of remote code, no hidden instructions. Safe to install.
